title: Impossible Survival
body: ![Impossible Survival Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b5d17fb8be8904bb21001e5e03c2d6200cd93c.webp) # ✅ Features - view with the realistic shaders - 🔉 Listen to the realistic sounds - 🗺️Look at the Ancient map to look where you are - 😮‍💨Leap into action with the satisfying gameplay&movement - 🏔️30+ new biomes - 🌪️Hide from the natural disasters - 🌡️Watch out for temperature, thirst, wetness and seasons - 🪚New items - Shaders - Thirst - Temperature - Localized Damage # 📸 Check Out Gallery - Explore In-game Screenshots From The Modpack - Everything You See In The Screenshots Is Visibile In-Game - Send Us Your Screenshot(s) To Get Featured In The Gallery # 🤝 Support - Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/uSzRGWqgn3), We or Our community will help you. - We also value your support Through Bug reports or Suggestions # ⚡ Performance - Our Modpack Are Optimized For The Best Performance and Smoothnest. - We Prioritize Quality Mods Over Laggier Ones - You Can Play On Lower-End Devices And Still Have Perfect Experience - We Recommend **4gb of Ram** # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
